OPERATIONAL_FLOWS_SETTINGS.DESCRIPTION: Configure the operational flow for each Caixa (inbox): the result reasons available when resolving a conversation as won or lost, and whether a reason is required.

API.ERROR_MESSAGE: Could not delete the operational flow

CONFIRM.TITLE: Delete {flowName}?
CONFIRM.MESSAGE: Are you sure you want to delete this operational flow? Caixas using it will fall back to no flow.

FORM.SUBTITLE: Define the reasons agents can pick when resolving a conversation.

REQUIRE_REASON.LABEL: Require a reason
REQUIRE_REASON.HELP: Agents must pick a reason to resolve a conversation as won or lost.

META.LABEL: Send conversions to Meta
META.HELP: Master switch for this flow. When on, each state below can fire a Meta event.

CATEGORY.LABEL: Category
CATEGORY.HELP: Reporting dimension. Sales closings feed the sales funnel; support closings are kept separate and never count as conversions.

STATES.LABEL: Resolution states (closing buttons)
STATES.HELP: Rename the buttons freely — the label is presentation only. The fixed key is what reports and integrations read, so renaming never changes your data.
STATES.REQUIRES_REASON: Require a reason for this state

INBOXES.LABEL: Caixas using this flow
INBOXES.HELP: A Caixa uses only one flow. Selecting it here moves it from any previous flow.

FORM.ERROR_MESSAGE: Could not save the operational flow

ASSIGNMENT_RULES.DESCRIPTION: Decide which flow applies to a conversation. Rules are evaluated by priority (lowest first); the first match wins. A missing dimension means "any".
ASSIGNMENT_RULES.EMPTY: No assignment rules yet. Conversations fall back to the flow attached to their Caixa.
ASSIGNMENT_RULES.PRIORITY_HELP: Lower numbers are evaluated first. The first rule that matches decides the flow.
ASSIGNMENT_RULES.SAVE_ERROR: Could not save the assignment rule
